name: Opulent Advance
descrip: Start making out with an opponent.
outcome: Iabel lets out a low hiss of warning and a swaying slither before she lunges at you with a sudden burst of speed, moving with smooth predatory grace, closing the distance in an instant to press her luxurious form against you with a purr, wrapping her arms around you to entrap you as she forces you into a deep, mind-numbing kiss.
miss: Iabel lets out a low hiss of warning and a swaying slither before she lunges at you with a sudden burst of speed, but [TargetName] manages to evade [AttackerName]'s grasp!
